possible_dialog: BZZZT. Oh, you want to mow my lawn? I suppose it is a bit overgrown...
My lawn needs to be mowed today but I'm too lazy. BZZZT.
reject_dialog: BZZZZZT. Sorry, my lawn doesn't need to be mowed today.
first_dialog: BZZZT - Okay buddy, I know I'm not the most good looking guy but you didn't need to be so rude about it.
Yeah, I get that a lot. I was born with a rare genetic disease that turned my face into that of a bug but I'm still a human just like you. What do you want? BZZZT.
Oh, sure. I have a bad wasp infestation by my flowers that I need cleared out. Can you help with that? BZZZT.
player_dialog: Uhm, are you in need of any lawn care services?
But, aren't those like your brothers?
first_job_offer: BZZZT. Yeah, yeah, very funny. I just told you, I'm human like you and I just happen to have the face of a bug. Are you going to help me out or just stare at me?
